meaning: n.<美>车辆禁行区(指都市内禁止车辆通行的住宅或商业区)
examples: These objects are the superblock, inode, dentry, and file.
The superblock is a structure that represents a file system.
The superblock is the container for high-level metadata about a file system.
Some are being restored and reconnected in the rebuilt, sterile superblock of the World Trade Center site.
